title: Make v0.5.39 source archive reproducible across release runners
rawUserRequest: 继续完成 v0.5.39 发布；修复 release workflow 的跨 runner source archive 摘要不一致后，继续完成 PR、合并、ai-close-work-item、同步默认分支并发布。

declaredIntent.summary: 统一 release workflow 与回归测试的跨 runner source archive 生成参数，并重新绑定 v0.5.39 archive digest。

outOfScope: Publishing a tag before this Work Item PR merges and ai-close-work-item succeeds.
Changing unrelated release or runtime behavior.

riskAssessment.reason: Change is bounded to deterministic archive encoding and its exact digest binding; provider publication remains gated.

executionDecision.reason: User explicitly authorized completing the release; this follow-up fixes provider runner reproducibility before retrying publication.

preReviewWarnings: Release archive bytes must be identical across local and Ubuntu runners.
acceptance: Workflow and regression test use identical deterministic archive encoding.
v0.5.39 release.json archive digest matches the source tree archive.
Finish Gate, PR checks, merge, closure, and default-branch synchronization complete before retrying publication.
guidelines: Published claims must be backed by provider-bound evidence.
The release tag and assets must be immutable and source-bound.

intent.problem: The first v0.5.39 release attempt failed because macOS and Ubuntu gzip implementations produced different archive bytes from the same source tree.
constraints: Do not weaken exact-source or public evidence checks.
Do not publish before PR merge and lifecycle closure.
intent.rationale: Use explicit gzip level and deterministic archive inputs so provider-generated archive bytes match the committed digest across runners.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: The same source tree produces the committed archive digest on local and provider runners.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized completion of the full release plan and publication.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore release archive bindings.
